about.title: About PeptideLab
about.mission: We provide research-grade peptides with verified purity to laboratories and research institutions across Europe.
about.testedDesc: Every batch is independently tested via HPLC and Mass Spectrometry. Results are documented in a Certificate of Analysis.
about.euDesc: Shipped from within the European Union. 1-3 day delivery to Bulgaria, 3-7 days across the EU.
about.coaDesc: Certificate of Analysis included with every order. Full transparency on purity and identity for every product.
about.qualityDesc: Our peptides are synthesized to ≥98% purity (HPLC). We provide batch-specific Certificates of Analysis documenting purity, identity, and molecular weight. All products are lyophilized for long-term stability and delivered in sealed vials.
about.disclaimer: All products are sold strictly for in-vitro research purposes only. Not intended for human consumption.

delivery.title: Delivery & Payment
delivery.packagingDesc: Discrete packaging. Temperature-controlled shipping when needed.
delivery.cardDesc: Visa, Mastercard, Apple Pay, Google Pay (via Stripe).
delivery.codDesc: Available in Bulgaria only. Pay when you receive your package.

returns.title: Returns & Refunds
returns.policyOverview: We accept returns of unopened products in original packaging within 14 days of receipt. Products that have been opened or used cannot be returned due to the nature of research reagents.
returns.condition1: Product must be in original, unopened packaging.
returns.condition2: Return request must be made within 14 days of receipt.
returns.condition3: Product must have been stored under correct conditions (see label).
returns.condition4: Return shipping is at the customer's expense, unless the product is defective.
returns.howToDesc: Contact us at info@peptidelab.bg or via WhatsApp with your order number and the reason for return. We will send you return instructions within 1 business day.
returns.refundDesc: After receiving and inspecting the returned product, we process refunds within 5-10 business days to your original payment method. For cash on delivery orders, refunds are issued via bank transfer.
returns.disclaimer: All products are sold strictly for in-vitro research purposes only. Not intended for human consumption.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.whatArePeptidesA: Research peptides are synthetic amino acid chains used in laboratory and scientific research. They are not intended for human consumption.
faq.purityTestingQ: Are your peptides tested for purity?
faq.purityTestingA: Yes, every batch is independently tested via HPLC and Mass Spectrometry. We guarantee a minimum purity of ≥98%.
faq.coaProvidedQ: Do you provide Certificates of Analysis?
faq.coaProvidedA: Yes, every order includes a batch-specific Certificate of Analysis documenting the purity and identity of the product.
faq.storageA: Lyophilized peptides should be stored at -20°C in a dry place. Reconstituted solution is stable for 2-4 weeks at 2-8°C.
faq.paymentMethodsQ: What payment methods do you accept?
faq.paymentMethodsA: We accept card payment (Visa, Mastercard, Apple Pay, Google Pay) via Stripe and cash on delivery (Bulgaria only).
faq.shippingTimeA: Delivery to Bulgaria is 1-2 business days via Econt or Speedy. EU shipping takes 3-7 business days.
faq.internationalShippingA: Yes, we ship to all European Union countries. International shipping is €9.99 and free above €149.
faq.returnPolicyA: Unopened products in original packaging can be returned within 14 days of receipt for a full refund.
faq.legalityA: Yes, research peptides are legal to purchase for laboratory and scientific purposes. They are not intended for human consumption.
faq.orderTrackingQ: How do I track my order?
faq.orderTrackingA: After shipping, you will receive a tracking number via email. You can also track your order on our website using your order number.

contact.thankYouSub: We will get back to you within 1 business day.
